name: Silver Storm Mining Ltd.
description: Silver Storm Mining Ltd. is a Canadian-based exploration and resource company focused on the acquisition, exploration, and development of silver-rich mineral properties in Mexico. The company is primarily committed to the potential near-term restart of its 100% owned La Parrilla Silver Mine Complex in Durango, which features a 2,000 tpd mill and extensive underground mining infrastructure. Additionally, the company holds the San Diego Project, recognized as one of the largest undeveloped silver-zinc assets in Mexico. Silver Storm Mining is publicly traded on the TSX Venture Exchange under the ticker symbol SVRS.
